subject: Small child figure in orange gi with energy gathering in one hand, dynamic running or fighting stance
description: A small child figure wearing an orange martial arts gi is shown in a dynamic low stance, leaning forward with one hand extended, a glowing energy orb visibly forming in the palm. The hair is dark and spiky. The expression is focused and determined. The background is a warm, clean gradient suggesting open outdoors or an arena setting. The scene captures the figure mid-motion, building toward an energy release, and the combination of the orange gi, child stature, dark spiky hair, and ki-gathering pose is strongly characteristic of the early Goku archetype.
foreground: Child in orange gi, ki energy forming in one palm, dynamic forward stance
background: Warm clean gradient, open setting, light warm tones
